source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/34_회사_지원사업/2025 한국원자력협력재단(탈락)/관련 첨부자료/1. 국내외 규격인증(CE, FDA 등)/4. 규격 인증(CB, KOLAS, CE etc)/ADD_IEC60601-1-2 KOLAS test report.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Nemko Korea issued KOLAS accredited EMC test report REP016786 for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models ADD, HAD1717MCW, and HAD1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Evidence of EMC testing and compliance against IEC/EN 60601-1-2 requirements for the tested samples.
keyPoints: The sample description is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model ADD, HAD1717MCW, HAD1417MCW.
Testing was performed from October 22, 2023 to November 30, 2023.
Disturbance Voltage and Radiated Disturbance results are marked Pass.
The report states the test certificate is accredited by Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme, which signed the ILAC-MRA.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal says MFDS/domestic, but the source text identifies KOLAS accreditation and does not mention MFDS.
No explicit document revision for the report itself is provided; NKQF-27-04 (Rev.8) appears to be a form/template identifier.
Several checkbox-style selections are present in extracted text without reliable checked/unchecked state, so selected limit classes and groups should be verified against the original PDF.
Pages 118 through 264 contain page headers but no extracted substantive text in the provided source.
